on

African champions South Africa and perennial rivals, Super Falcons of Nigeria, will clash in the final round of the qualifiers for the 2024 Olympic Games.

The Banyana Banyana booked a date with the Super Falcons following a 1-0 victory over Tanzania on Tuesday.

Thembi Kgatlana scored the decisive goal two minutes before the hour mark.

South Africa won the tie 4-0 on aggregate.

Nigeria won their fixture against the Indomitable Lionesses 1-0 on aggregate.

The final round tie will be staged on a home and away basis in April.

title: 2024 Olympic Qualifier: South Africa set up final round clash with Super Falcons - Daily Post Nigeria
author: Mike Oyebola
description: African champions South Africa and perennial rivals, Super Falcons of Nigeria, will clash in the final round of the qualifiers for the 2024 Olympic Games.
